signal.summary: North America edition of the established NDC brand; NDC Oslo draws 2,500+ developers with strong practitioner-written recaps and named speakers. Toronto edition is new (expanded from CPP North) so no independent attendee signal for this specific city yet.

sources.note: Practitioner recap of NDC Oslo 2025 highlights positive community and session quality
Developer wrap-up of NDC Oslo 2025 from practitioner perspective
Official site confirms May 5-8 at The Westin Harbour Castle, Toronto

signal.summary: Python's flagship community conference with 2,000+ attendees and multiple independent practitioner recaps; 2026 adds dedicated AI and security tracks with practitioner speakers.

sources.note: Trey Hunner's personal PyCon US 2025 recap — prominent Python educator, strong signal
Will Vincent (Django News) recap of PyCon US 2025
Simon Willison (prominent practitioner) preview post for PyCon US 2026
Official site confirms May 13-21 at Long Beach Convention Center

signal.summary: LangChain's annual practitioner conference focused on production AI agents; 2025 inaugural edition drew 800 attendees with talks from Cisco, Uber, Replit, LinkedIn, Blackrock, JPMorgan, and Harvey. Multiple independent practitioner recaps from 2025 cover concrete agent-engineering takeaways, not vendor pitches.

sources.note: Lawrence Wu personal practitioner recap of Interrupt 2025 with technical takeaways
Cameron Rohn practitioner highlights from Interrupt 2025: 'rise of the agent engineer'
99P Labs (Ryan Lingo) applied-AI takeaways from Interrupt 2025
Official site confirms May 13-14, 2026 at The Midway, San Francisco

signal.summary: First Asia edition of the AI Engineer brand; backed by OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Cursor, and Z.ai with 50+ speakers. No independent practitioner recap yet as it's a new event, but the series has strong track record.

sources.note: 65labs coverage of AI Engineer Singapore launch with speaker and sponsor details
Mission Media coverage confirming OpenAI, DeepMind, Cursor participation

signal.summary: Highly community-driven Python conference (~670 attendees in 2025) consistently praised by named Python practitioners. 2026 program includes Nicholas Tollervy, Sofie Van Landeghem and other recognized speakers; 2025 had three independent practitioner recaps from Rodrigo Girao Serrao (mathspp), Paolo Melchiorre, and Stefanie Molin.

sources.note: Rodrigo Girao Serrao's personal highlights from PyCon Italy 2025
Paolo Melchiorre's organizer/speaker/attendee perspective on PyCon Italy 2025

Official site confirms May 27-30, 2026 at Savoia Hotel Regency, Bologna

signal.summary: The flagship practitioner AI engineering conference; 2025 drew 3,098 attendees (22% principal/staff eng) with 10+ tracks and widespread independent blog coverage. Multiple engineers call it the highest-signal AI conf of the year.

sources.note: Latent.Space in-depth recap of 2025 keynotes with practitioner analysis
Engineer personal experience post from 2025 World's Fair
7 learnings from the 2025 AI Engineering SF World Fair — practitioner-written
Official site confirms June 29 - July 2, 2026 at Moscone Center, SF

signal.summary: Premier ML research conference (ICML 2025: 12,107 submissions, 3,260 accepted papers); consistently the highest-density venue for ML researchers and practitioners. 2026 at COEX, Seoul.

sources.note: Official ICML X post announcing Seoul dates for 2026
Official ICML 2026 conference page confirming July 6-11, COEX Seoul
Practitioner blog covering ICML and other major AI conferences — recommends for depth

signal.summary: Largest European Python conference, run by the EuroPython Society. 2025 in Prague drew 1,200+ attendees with multiple independent practitioner recaps; key takeaway from Will Vincent's recap was that 'professional developers are using AI tools but no one had fully automated workflows' — exactly the practitioner signal worth attending for.

sources.note: Will Vincent (Django News) recap of EuroPython 2025 with practitioner takeaways on AI adoption
Rodrigo Girao Serrao personal highlights from EuroPython 2025
Cheuk Ting Ho personal practitioner recap of EuroPython 2025
EuroPython Society blog confirms July 13-19, 2026 in Krakow

signal.summary: The flagship Go programming conference, traditionally featuring core Go team members and named OSS contributors. 2025 NYC edition (Aug 26-28) had practitioner recaps; 2026 program (150+ submissions, lineup expected May 2026) is being reviewed by an evaluation committee — venue and dates confirmed.

sources.note: Kristina Ivanova practitioner recap of GopherCon 2025 NYC with technical takeaways
Diagrid engineering blog GopherCon 2024 recap
Official site confirms Aug 3-6, 2026 at Seattle Convention Center | Summit

signal.summary: Community-run Django conference; 2025 (Chicago, 20-year Django anniversary) drew 400+ attendees with three independent practitioner recaps and named speakers like Carson Gross (HTMX). Strong community signal but smaller in scope than PyCon US.

sources.note: Will Vincent (Django News) DjangoCon US 2025 recap
Caktus Group practitioner recap of DjangoCon US 2025
GitGuardian engineering blog: 'DjangoCon US 2025: Security, Simplicity, and Community'
Official site confirms Aug 24-28, 2026 at voco Chicago Downtown

signal.summary: Rust Foundation's flagship community conference; 2025 (Seattle) featured async Rust workshops, automotive (Rivian) and edge AI talks. Practitioner recaps available from corrode.dev and the Rust Foundation. 2026 marks the 10th anniversary edition.

sources.note: corrode Rust Consulting comparative review of 2025 Rust conferences including RustConf
Rust Foundation review of RustConf 2025 with talk highlights
Official site confirms Sept 8-11, 2026 at Palais des Congres de Montreal

signal.summary: Flagship NDC edition; 150+ named speakers including Mads Torgersen (C# lead designer) and 2,500+ practitioner attendees historically. Independent practitioner recaps consistently appear after every edition; quality of speakers rated highly via NDC's green/amber/red feedback cards.

sources.note: Practitioner highlights of NDC Oslo 2025 (Improve & Repeat blog)
Chris Ayers developer wrap-up of NDC Oslo 2025
Official site confirms Sept 14-18, 2026 at Oslo Spektrum with 150 speakers, 160 sessions

signal.summary: Long-running practitioner software conference with Martin Fowler, Kent Beck, and other named practitioners on the program. Strong European dev community presence but independent Reddit/blog signal is thin.

sources.note: Practitioner recap of GOTO 2025 Copenhagen — AI agents in practice session

signal.summary: Official AI Engineer conference in NYC; same high-quality brand as the SF flagship but East Coast edition. No separate attendee signal yet beyond the series reputation.

sources.note: Official AI Engineer NYC page confirms October 12-14, 2026 in Manhattan

signal.summary: Long-running open-source conference; 2025 (13th edition) drew 6,500+ registrants across 200+ sessions and 18 tracks including AI, dev tooling, and community. Practitioner recaps highlight strong hallway-track and community-driven content rather than vendor pitches.

signal.summary: CNCF's flagship conference; draws 10,000+ cloud-native practitioners annually with extensive practitioner blog coverage and O'Reilly/Harness/CNCF-authored recaps. Attendance slightly down but remains top-tier for Kubernetes/cloud-native.

signal.summary: Practitioner-curated senior engineering conference run by InfoQ; keynotes from named engineers at Google, Microsoft, and others. No vendor marketing — presentations are experience-based.

signal.summary: The world's largest ML research conference; 21,575 submissions in 2025 with broad practitioner and researcher attendance. Sydney venue is first time in Australia — high buzz and accessibility for APAC ML community.
